title: Better Lightning Sounds
description: Replacement audio for lightning impacts & thunder // Thunder & LIghtning sounds from Gentler Weather Sounds
body:
Standalone lightning & thunder sounds from Gentler Weather Sounds

While I love what I've made with Gentler Weather Sounds (and I highly suggest using it!), I also understand that a complete replacement might not be everyone's cup of tea. So this pack offers just the lightning & thunder audio!

The Resource Pack selection screen may show a warning on older versions but the audio works back to 1.7!

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Sounds Used Any uncredited sounds are designed/ recorded by me All sounds have been edited to work together better [https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/natural-thunder-113219/](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/natural-thunder-113219/) [https://freesound.org/people/bone666138/sounds/198857/](https://freesound.org/people/bone666138/sounds/198857/) [https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/thunder-24571/](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/thunder-24571/) [https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/natural-thunder-113219/](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/natural-thunder-113219/) [https://freesound.org/people/Spennnyyy/sounds/350506/](https://freesound.org/people/Spennnyyy/sounds/350506/) [https://freesound.org/people/jrosin/sounds/329978/](https://freesound.org/people/jrosin/sounds/329978/) [https://freesound.org/people/dobroide/sounds/41365/](https://freesound.org/people/dobroide/sounds/41365/) [https://freesound.org/people/fattirewhitey/sounds/523905/](https://freesound.org/people/fattirewhitey/sounds/523905/)
